zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeliza Eunice Baalun於1050年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特時，她的父親Dreux I de Balun45歲，母親Agnes Orguen33歲。她於大約1064年與Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年100歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeliza Eunice Baalun于1050年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特时，她的父亲Dreux I de Balun45岁，母亲Agnes Orguen33岁。她于大约1064年与Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1150年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eunice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Greek name, derived from eu ‘well, good’ + nikē ‘victory’. This is mentioned in the New Testament as the name of the mother of Timothy, who introduced him to Christianity (2 Timothy 1:5). This reference led to the name being taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeliza Eunice Baalun was born in 1050, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Dreux I de Balun, was 45 and her mother, Agnes Orguen, was 33. She married Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester about 1064, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1150, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeliza Eunice Baalun est née en 1050, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Dreux I de Balun, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes Orguen, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester environ 1064, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1150, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeliza Eunice Baalun 1050 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dreux I de Balun 45 und ihre Mutter Agnes Orguen 33. Sie hat um 1064 in England Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 100 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza Eunice Baalun è nata il nel 1050 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Dreux I de Balun, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Agnes Orguen, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester circa 1064, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1150, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza Eunice Baalunが1050年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで生まれた時，父Dreux I de Balunは45歳，母Agnes Orguenは33歳であった。約1064年にイギリスでRoger De Hauteville Of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1150年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza Eunice Baalun(이)가 1050년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dreux I de Balun(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Orguen(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1064년 영국에서 Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza Eunice Baalun nasceu em 1050, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Dreux I de Balun, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Orguen, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester aproximadamente 1064, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1150, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeliza Eunice Baalun родилась в 1050 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Dreux I de Balun было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Orguen, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester около 1064 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1150 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeliza Eunice Baalun nació en 1050, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Dreux I de Balun, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnes Orguen, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Roger De Hauteville Of Gloucester aproximadamente 1064, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1150, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 100 años.
